_comment: Copy this file to ~/.opendrc.json (applies everywhere) or ./.opendrc.json in a project (overrides the home config there). Legacy .veniceagentrc.json files are read only as a migration fallback. VENICE_API_KEY/VENICE_MODEL/VENICE_POSTURE env vars always win.
_baseUrl_comment: OpenAI-compatible API base. Leave as Venice for the uncensored default. Point at a local Ollama abliterated model (http://localhost:11434/v1) for a fully off-grid uncensored setup — venice_parameters is only sent to Venice.
_contextTokens_comment: Sliding-window budget in estimated tokens. Oldest whole conversation rounds are trimmed once history exceeds this.
_maxRetries_comment: Retry attempts on transient API errors (429/5xx/network) before giving up, with exponential backoff.
_pricing_comment: USD per 1,000,000 tokens (in = prompt, out = completion). Leave at 0/0 to show token counts without a dollar cost — the heretic model's real pricing isn't hardcoded here.
_bypassDefault_comment: Start in bypass permission mode (auto-approve edits/commands inside the active boundary). Warning patterns still confirm, but regexes are not the security boundary.
_showUsagePerTurn_comment: Print a token-usage line after every turn, in addition to the /usage command.
_showThinking_comment: Render the dimmed 'thinking>' reasoning panel in the terminal. Display-only: the model still produces reasoning regardless (that's veniceParams.disableThinking) — this just shows or hides it. Toggle at runtime with /thinking.
_extraDenylist_comment: Extra regex patterns (as strings) that always require confirmation for run_command, even in bypass mode — on top of the built-in catastrophic-command list.
_temperature_comment: Sampling temperature. OMIT this key entirely to use the provider's default (recommended). If set, it is sent on every request. Can also be set via the VENICE_TEMPERATURE env var.
_maxIterations_comment: Max tool-call rounds the agent runs in a single turn before it stops to avoid an infinite loop.
_commandTimeoutMs_comment: Hard timeout for run_command, in milliseconds. A command still running after this is killed and reported as timed out.
_summarizeOnPrune_comment: When old conversation rounds fall out of the context window, condense them into a rolling structured summary (kept in context) instead of dropping them outright. Costs one extra non-streaming model call whenever eviction happens. Set false for the old drop-and-forget behavior.
_maxSummaryTokens_comment: max_tokens for the summarizer call. Bounds how large the rolling summary can grow (kept well under provider ceilings).
_sessionRetentionDays_comment: Delete session files older than this many days at startup. Set 0 to disable automatic retention.
_autoSave_comment: Auto-save non-empty interactive sessions on exit. Session files use restrictive permissions and common credential redaction.
_veniceParams_comment: Venice-only request options (ignored on non-Venice endpoints). disableThinking:false is what makes the model emit its reasoning; stripThinkingResponse:false keeps that reasoning in the response so the CLI can render the dimmed 'thinking>' panel. Set disableThinking:true to turn reasoning off. includeVeniceSystemPrompt:false uses opend's own system prompt instead of Venice's.
